positive: Minimalist stylized geometric mountain range silhouette with a rising sun gradient background, featuring clean, abstract line art detailing a calm alpaca grazing in the meadow. Flat vector graphic style, high contrast, limited color palette of slate blue, gold, and cream. Central composition, perfect for apparel printing. Intricate detail but maintaining clean edges and separation between elements. Photorealistic gradient background fill, digital art, centered, golden hour lighting, perfect symmetry, isolated on white or transparent background.
negative: text, signature, logo, watermark, blurry, artifacts, noisy, multiple backgrounds, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low contrast, copyright, graffiti
